title: Sara's plan — Eva tells Joe FIND Ginger
prompt:
Cast (Halloween night):
- @Sara: 7yo, FAIRY-PRINCESS COSTUME — silver tiara, pink-white ombre tutu w/ crystal bodice, glittery wings, fairy wand + jack-o-lantern bucket. Wavy dark-blonde hair, fair skin, brown eyes.
- @Eva: 3yo, PUMPKIN-ONESIE COSTUME — round orange pumpkin body w/ carved jack-o-lantern face on tummy, green leaf-stem hat, tiny pumpkin treat bucket. Curly bright-blonde hair, fair skin, brown eyes.
- @Joe: fluffy cream-and-gold POMERANIAN dog in red-with-black-spots LADYBUG body costume.

Camera: slow dolly push, eye-level, opening medium-wide — matches the closing frame of clip 2, porch with right edge of frame empty where Ginger exited.

Scene: @front_house_fall front porch — pumpkin lanterns at frame edges, soft fall leaves on the boards.

0:0-0:2 — Slow dolly push from medium-wide toward chest height on @Sara. @Sara center-left standing, candy bucket in left hand at hip, magic-wand softly in right hand. @Eva center-right in a one-knee-down crouch beside @Joe, right hand on his blue leash close to the collar, left hand on his bug-back. @Joe standing calm at Eva's left side, all four paws planted.

0:2-0:4 — Slow dolly in, closer medium on @Sara. @Sara lifts the magic-wand to a plan-pointing angle near her shoulder — small in-place gesture. @Sara: "We trick-or-treat AND we ask everyone! Joe can SNIFF for her!"

0:4-0:6 — Cut to low-angle close-up on @Eva and @Joe at Joe's eye level. @Eva looks down at @Joe with soft determined eyes, gives one gentle in-place pat on his bug-back. @Joe lifts his nose for a tiny in-place sniff of the porch boards then looks up at Eva with a tail-wag. @Eva, looking down at @Joe: "Don't run away, Joe. FIND Ginger."

0:6-0:8 — Slow pan up from @Joe to @Eva's face, then continues panning up to @Sara who has turned slightly toward camera. @Sara breaks the fourth wall, looks directly into the lens. @Sara, softly to camera: "Will YOU help us find Ginger?"

0:8-1:0 — Slow pull back to opening medium-wide. Trio settles. Pumpkin-orange porch glow holds the beat.

Lighting: warm pumpkin-orange porch lanterns, golden-hour Halloween night.
Style: Pixar 3D feature-render, cinematic kid-show, NOT scary.
negativePrompt: duplicate character, twin, clone, two of the same, mirrored figure, second father, two Papa, identical adults, second mother, two Mama, mama visible, papa visible, third child, second sister, second sara, second eva, two eva, duplicate eva, three girls, fourth child, fifth child, additional children, extra child in background, ghost figure, ghost kid, ghost children, shadow children, shadow of person, mirrored children, mirror reflection, family members in the background, strangers, crowd, group of people, other faces, background people, friends, neighbors, extra neighbors, three arms, third arm, extra arm, extra hand, floating hand, anatomy error, scary face, frightening expression, horror lighting, scary monster, real monster, monstrous teeth, fangs, claws, papa angry, papa thundering shout, papa apoplectic, papa rage face, intense yelling, blood, red liquid, red splatter, red stain, gore, injury, scary, violent, distressing, motion lines, action lines, dust trails, speed lines, motion blur, papa with hair, papa not bald, eva with brown hair, eva with red hair, eva brunette, sara in ponytail, sara with straight hair, morphing, flickering, disfigured, distorted, extra face, unstable motion, papa standing still, papa motionless, papa idle, papa observing without acting, papa waiting passively, joe airborne, joe leaping, sara airborne, eva airborne, ginger visible, ginger in this clip, second dog, two joe, eva running, sara running, eva crossing the porch, sara crossing the porch, dutch angle, handheld shake, jump cut
cameraStyle: slow dolly push to chest-height medium with one cut to low-angle close-up, capped by a slow pan up and slow pull back
closingFrame: Porch composition holding the trio — @Sara center-left standing tall with magic-wand at shoulder height in plan-pointing angle and candy bucket at hip in left hand; @Eva center-right in one-knee-down crouch with right hand on @Joe's blue leash and left hand on his bug-back; @Joe standing alert at Eva's left side, all four paws planted in red-with-black-spots bug costume, tail mid-wag; soft pumpkin-orange porch lantern glow flanking the open front door.
